transcript.text: Hello. I think if you get a song in your mind, you should sing it pretty quick because you might lose your beat and come up with another beat. So I'm here crystallizing the song in my head so that I can use it in a song later on. Right? So it goes a little bit like this.
I've got to tune out my tongue a little bit with the Tabasco sauce. Okay, here we go. I think I have white guy beat.
